summary: Backend Sessions CRUD + Wi-Fi relay forward proxy + Frontend Sessions modal/Delete-selected/Example circuit flows all PASS. Created pytest suite (6/6 pass) verifying POST/GET/LIST/DELETE /api/sessions with Arabic roundtrip (name='اختبار', student_name='أحمد') and /api/wifi-relay/forward returning 200 with status='error' for unreachable host. Frontend Playwright covered: open-sessions-btn opens sessions-modal containing all 4 required testids; pre-seeded session row + load + delete buttons render; save flow (Arabic name 'TEST_PW_save_arabic_جلسة' + student 'محمد') produces success toast 'تم حفظ الجلسة في قاعدة البيانات' and new row appears; delete confirms via window.confirm, shows 'تم الحذف' toast, and row disappears; load-example-circuit-btn closes modal, shows 'تم تحميل' toast, and workspace shows no empty-state (components visible on Konva canvas in screenshot); delete-selected-btn correctly hidden when nothing selected; run/stop toggle works both ways; Wi-Fi modal opens (verified visually). Konva-internal wire-click selection could not be DOM-tested (canvas-rendered) — verified the conditional rendering of delete-selected-btn instead, as suggested in the review request. Zero console errors during the run.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py forward_relay_command uses a broad except Exception which is acceptable here (deliberate per spec to avoid 500 on local network errors) but consider narrowing to httpx.RequestError + httpx.HTTPError to avoid swallowing programming bugs.
SessionsModal performs no debounce/optimistic UI on delete — fine for current scope but on slow networks the row may briefly remain after confirm. Minor UX.
App.js is now 483 lines (still under 700 threshold) — fine.
No SessionUpdate (PUT) endpoint is exercised in the UI but is defined in server.py — dead code unless intended for future use.
wifi-relay/forward returns {status:'error', message:str(e)} which can leak internal error strings; consider redacting in production but acceptable for lab/educational tool.
seed_data_creation: Test sessions prefixed with TEST_PW_* and TEST_* were created during Playwright/pytest runs and cleaned up at end of each run via DELETE /api/sessions/{id} (fixture + JS loop).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features verified: (1) example circuit load via load-example-circuit-btn closes modal + populates Konva workspace + shows Arabic toast; (2) delete-selected-btn conditionally shown only when selectedItem set — DOM-side confirmed; (3) unified deviceChannels for contactor+relay implemented in App.js useMemo (lines 71-78) — code-reviewed but not exercised at runtime because it requires placing components; (4) Mongo session CRUD works with Arabic Unicode preserved (no corruption). Konva canvas elements (wire/terminal/component shapes) cannot be selected via DOM/Playwright selectors — for those interactions consider Konva pointer-event simulation via page.mouse.click on coordinates or expose a debug global. Pytest file located at /app/backend/tests/test_sessions_api.py reusable for regression.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
